<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `aube create`

- **Usage**: `aube create [PARAMS]…`

Scaffold a project from a `create-*` starter kit (via dlx)

## Arguments

### `[PARAMS]…`

Template package name followed by any args to pass through to the scaffold binary.

The first positional is the template; the rest are forwarded verbatim to `create-<template>`.
